name: Sponge Cake Dominic's
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine egg whites and salt. Beat until they form soft peaks.
3. Gradually beat in 1/4 cup sugar into the egg whites until they form stiff peaks.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks until thick and foamy.
5. Slowly beat in remaining sugar and water.
6. Sift together flour and baking powder into another bowl.
7. Slowly add the yolk mixture to the flour mixture.
8. Stir in lemon rind.
9. Gently fold egg whites into the yolk mixture until well combined.
10. Pour batter into a greased cake pan and bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched with a finger.
11. Allow to cool completely before removing from pans and peeling off waxed paper.
